transcript.text: Sometimes taking care of your creative process is actually better than creating. Burnout is real and you can see it all across YouTube. In fact, we looked at some YouTube channels that were uploading five times a week or more for at least [music] three months straight. These creators were grinding hard, but one in four of those channels have either stopped uploading entirely or [music] watched their views completely collapse. The catch to this advice is that it could be easier said than done. But this has been the big secret [music] to why I've been doing this as long as I have. It's literally the best thing I do for myself. My favorite way to unwind is to play some video games or more recently mod retro gaming hardware. Gaming is fun, but adding retro gaming to the mix makes it so I never have to go outside.
